contact.pageDescription: Contact the SmallPDF.us team. We read every message and reply within 24 hours.
contact.heroTitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.heroSubtitle: A question, a bug, or a feature suggestion? Send us a message — real people read every one.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…
contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

about.pageDescription: Learn about the SmallPDF.us team and mission — free, private, and powerful PDF tools for everyone.
about.heroTitle: Built for everyone who works with PDFs
about.heroSubtitle: We're a team of engineers, designers, and lawyers who believe great PDF tools should always be free, fast, and private.
about.missionTitle: Free PDF tools for every person on the planet
about.missionPara: SmallPDF.us was founded in 2018 with one idea: the best PDF tools should be free. No paywalls, no accounts, no tricks. Just fast, private, reliable tools for students, businesses, and everyone else.
about.valuesFreeDesc: No trials. No paywalls. Core tools stay free forever.
about.valuesPrivacyDesc: Files deleted within 2 hours — by architecture, not just policy.
about.valuesSimplicityDesc: No account. No jargon. If a flow takes 3+ clicks, we redesign it.
about.valuesGlobalDesc: 8 languages, every device. A student in Jakarta or an exec in Berlin — it works.
about.valuesQualityDesc: Every engine is tested against 1,000+ real documents before release.
about.valuesRoadmapDesc: Real users vote on features. Your feedback defines what we ship next.
about.teamSubtitle: Engineers, designers, and lawyers who believe great software should be open to everyone — not locked behind a paywall.
about.teamSize: 26 people across engineering, design, security, legal & support · 11 countries
about.trustSubtitle: Accreditations and certifications — not just words.
about.ctaSubtitle: No account. No credit card. No BS. Free, fast, private PDF tools.

privacy.layoutDescription: SmallPDF.us Privacy Policy. We process your files and delete them within 2 hours. No accounts, no tracking, no data selling.
privacy.paymentPara: When you subscribe to a paid plan, your payment is processed by Razorpay (for India/INR payments) or Paddle (for international/USD payments). We do not store your card number, bank details, or payment information on our servers. All payment data is processed exclusively by our payment providers in accordance with their respective security and privacy policies.
privacy.highlight1Desc: Every file is encrypted in transit and at rest with AES-256.
privacy.highlight2Desc: Files are permanently deleted from our servers within 2 hours of processing.
privacy.highlight3Desc: We never ask for your email or personal info to use our tools.
privacy.introPara: SmallPDF.us is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our PDF tools.
privacy.collect1Para: Files are uploaded temporarily for processing only. We do not store, read, analyze, or share your file contents. Files are permanently deleted within 2 hours.
privacy.collect2Intro: We collect minimal technical data to operate and improve the service:
collect2List: Pages visited and time on site
privacy.collect3Para: We do not collect your name, email address, or any personally identifiable information unless you contact us voluntarily. We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.useIntro: We use collected data solely to:
useList: Provide and improve the PDF processing service
Prevent abuse and ensure platform security
Respond to support requests (if you contact us)
securityList: 256-bit AES encryption for all file transfers (HTTPS)
Files stored on isolated, access-controlled servers
No employee can access your file contents
Automatic deletion within 2 hours — enforced at infrastructure level
privacy.securityPara: Our infrastructure is hosted in ISO 27001-certified data centers in the EU and US. All file transfers use TLS 1.3 encryption.
privacy.retentionFiles: Uploaded files are automatically and permanently deleted from our servers within 2 hours of upload. This is enforced at the infrastructure level.
privacy.retentionLogs: Anonymized usage logs (no file content or personal identifiers) may be retained for up to 12 months for security and performance analysis.
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We use a small number of third-party services to operate the platform:
thirdPartyList: Cloud hosting providers (EU/US data centers, ISO 27001-certified)
Analytics (privacy-respecting, no ad IDs, no cross-site tracking)
Razorpay — payment processing for India (INR). Razorpay may collect your payment information per its privacy policy.
Paddle — payment processing for international users (USD). Paddle acts as Merchant of Record and handles VAT/tax. Paddle's privacy policy applies.
privacy.thirdPartyNote: We do not sell, rent, or trade your data with third parties for marketing or advertising purposes. Payment data (card numbers, bank details) is handled entirely by Razorpay (India) and Paddle (international) — we never store your payment credentials.
privacy.rightsIntro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights under GDPR, CCPA, or applicable law:
rightsList: Right to access your personal data
Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')
Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
privacy.childrenPara: SmallPDF.us is not directed at children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, contact us and we will delete it promptly.
privacy.internationalPara: SmallPDF.us is operated from India. If you access our service from outside India, your data may be transferred and processed in jurisdictions with different data protection laws. International payments are processed in USD via Paddle — your payment data is subject to Paddle's privacy policy. By using our service, you consent to this transfer, subject to this Privacy Policy.
privacy.changesPara: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the new policy on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contactPara: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:
privacy.contactResponse: We aim to respond within 48 hours
privacy.bottomSubtitle: We take your privacy seriously. Our team is happy to answer any questions.

terms.layoutDescription: Read SmallPDF.us Terms of Service. Free, no hidden fees, files deleted within 2 hours.
terms.noticeText: By using SmallPDF.us, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully. If you disagree, please stop using the service.
terms.s1Para: By accessing or using SmallPDF.us, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
terms.s2Para: SmallPDF.us grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use our PDF tools for lawful personal or professional purposes. You may not:
s2NotList: Upload files containing illegal content, malware, or viruses
Attempt to reverse-engineer, scrape, or exploit the service
Use the service to process files you do not own or have no right to process
Interfere with or disrupt the platform's infrastructure
Use automated bots or scripts to bulk-process files without written permission
terms.s3FileSize: Free plan: up to 100 MB per file. Starter plan: up to 200 MB (50 MB for Office conversions). Pro & Agency plans: unlimited file size.
terms.s3Storage: Uploaded files are automatically deleted within 2 hours of processing.
terms.s3Responsibility: You are solely responsible for the content of files you upload. Do not upload confidential, classified, or legally protected documents without understanding and accepting the associated risks.
terms.s4Para1: All technology, source code, branding, and design elements of SmallPDF.us are the intellectual property of SmallPDF.us and its licensors.
terms.s4Para2: You retain full ownership of all files and content you upload. We claim no intellectual property rights over your documents.
terms.s5Notice: SmallPDF.us is provided 'as is' without any express or implied warranties.
terms.s5Para: We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that results will meet your specific requirements.
terms.s6Para: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SmallPDF.us and its officers, directors, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms.s7Para: Your use of SmallPDF.us is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. We are committed to GDPR and CCPA compliance.
terms.s8Para: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time, with or without notice.
terms.s9Para: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the service after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s10Para: These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Delhi, India.
terms.s11Para: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
terms.s12Para: SmallPDF.us offers optional paid subscription plans (Starter, Pro, Agency) that unlock higher file size limits, batch processing, and priority support. By subscribing, you agree to pay the fees shown on the pricing page at the time of purchase.
s12BillingList: Users in India are billed in INR via Razorpay (UPI, cards, net banking). Subscriptions auto-renew monthly or annually until cancelled.
International users are billed in USD via Paddle (cards, PayPal, Apple Pay & more). Subscriptions auto-renew monthly or annually until cancelled.
All prices are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
terms.s12CancelPara: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard. Access remains active until the end of the current billing period. India subscriptions are managed via Razorpay; international subscriptions are managed via Paddle.
terms.s12RefundPara: Refunds are governed by our Refund Policy. A 7-day money-back guarantee applies to first-time subscribers who have not significantly used paid features. See our full Refund Policy for details.
terms.bottomSubtitle: We're happy to explain anything in plain language. Feel free to reach out.

refund.seoDescription: SmallPDF.us offers a 7-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers. Learn how to request a refund for Starter, Pro, or Agency plans.
refund.seoKeywords: smallpdf refund policy, money back guarantee, cancel subscription, billing
refund.heroSubtitle: We want you to love SmallPDF.us. If you don't, we'll make it right.
refund.highlight1Desc: New subscribers get a 7-day money-back guarantee from the date of first payment.
refund.highlight2Desc: If you're not satisfied within 7 days, we'll refund you — no lengthy explanations needed.
refund.highlight3Desc: Approved refunds are credited back to your original payment method within 5–7 business days.
refund.sidebarNeedRefundDesc: Email us and we'll process it within 2 business days.
refund.overviewPara1: SmallPDF.us offers optional paid subscription plans — Starter, Pro, and Agency — to unlock higher limits and premium features. We stand behind the quality of our service and offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for first-time subscribers.
refund.overviewPara2: This policy applies to all paid plans purchased on SmallPDF.us. Free-tier users are not affected — free tools remain free and are not subject to any billing.
refund.overviewNote: Refund eligibility is determined at the time of the request. Please read the eligible and ineligible sections below before submitting a request.
refund.eligibleTitle: When You Are Eligible for a Refund
refund.eligibleIntro: You qualify for a full refund if all of the following conditions are met:
refund.eligible1: You subscribed for the first time (first-time subscriber only)
refund.eligible2: You are requesting within 7 days of your initial payment date
refund.eligible3: You have processed fewer than 20 files using paid-plan features
refund.eligible4: Your account is in good standing (not suspended or banned for abuse)
refund.ineligibleTitle: When You Are NOT Eligible for a Refund
refund.ineligibleIntro: Refunds will not be issued in the following situations:
refund.ineligible1: Refund requests submitted more than 7 days after the payment date
refund.ineligible2: Renewal payments (second month/year onwards — plan already active)
refund.ineligible3: Accounts that have significantly used paid features (20+ files processed)
refund.ineligible4: Accounts suspended or terminated for violation of our Terms of Service
refund.ineligible5: Requests citing dissatisfaction with free-tier tools (those remain free)
refund.ineligible6: Partial refunds for unused days — plans are sold as full billing periods
refund.processIntro: To submit a refund request, email us at contact@smallpdf.us with the following details:
refund.step1Desc: The email you used to sign up / pay.
refund.step2Desc: Found in your payment confirmation email from Razorpay or PayPal.
refund.step4Desc: Brief note on why you'd like a refund. Helps us improve.
refund.timeline1Desc: We review your request and confirm eligibility. You'll receive an email within 2 business days.
refund.timeline2Desc: If approved, we initiate the refund through Razorpay or PayPal.
refund.timeline3Desc: Funds appear in your original payment method (card, UPI, bank account, or PayPal balance). Bank timelines vary.
refund.intlPara: International plans are billed as one-time payments in USD via Razorpay + PayPal. There is no automatic renewal — you must manually renew before your plan expires.
refund.intlEligibilityDesc: Same 7-day window applies. Eligible conditions are identical to India plans.
refund.intlMethodDesc: Refunded to original PayPal account or card used at checkout. Currency: USD.
refund.intlNote: Note: PayPal may apply its own processing delays. Typically 3–5 business days after we initiate the refund.
refund.cancelIndiaPara: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard under Settings → Subscription. Your plan remains active until the end of the current billing cycle. No pro-rated refunds are issued for the remaining days after cancellation.
refund.cancelIntlPara: International plans do not auto-renew. They expire automatically after 32 days (monthly) or 366 days (yearly). No cancellation action is needed — simply do not renew when it expires.
refund.contactPara: For refund requests, billing questions, or cancellation help, please reach out to our support team:
refund.contactResponseTime: We aim to respond within 2 business days
refund.ctaSubtitle: We're happy to help. Email us and we'll sort it out.
